GB 17896一2022

Foreword

SAC/TC 20 is in charge of this English translation. In case of any doubt about the contents of English

translation ，the Chinese original shall be considered authoritative.

This document is drafted in accordance with the rules given in the GB/T 1.1一2020 Directives for

standardlization一Part 1: Rules for the structure and drafting of standardizing documents.

This document replaces GB 17896一2012 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy

efficiency grades of ballasts for tubular forescent /amps ,GB 19574一2004 Limited values of energy

efficiency and evaluating values of energy conservation of ballast for high-pressure sodium lamps，

GB 20053一2015 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for bal-

lasts of metar-haliae /amps ,GB 29143一2012 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and en-

ergy efficiency graaes of ballasts for electrodeless fuorescent lamps in whole.In addition to structur-
al adjustment and editorial changes，the following technical deviations have been made with respect
to the GB 17896一2012, GB 19574一2004, GB 20053一2015， GB 29143一2012 :

a) Deleted terms and definitions of“evaluating values of energy conservation for ballasts”.“effi-
cacy factor of ballast for high pressure sodium lamp”,“limited values of energy efficiency of
ballast for high pressure sodium lamp”,“evaluating values of energy conservation of ballast for
high pressure sodium lamp”and “target limited values of energy efficiency of ballast for high
pressure sodium lamp”(See 3.3 of GB 17896一2012，Clause 3 of GB 19574一2004， 3.2 of
GB 20053一2015, 3.3 of GB 29143一2012) ;

b) Revised term and definition of“standby power”(See 3.3. 3.4 of GB 17896一2012. 3.3 of
GB 20053一2015, 3.4 of GB 29143一2012)

c) Deleted “Basic requirements”(See Clause 4 of GB 17896一2012. 4.1 of GB 19574一2004, 4.1 of
GB 20053一2015，Clause 4 of GB 29143一2012)

d) Deleted requirement on total input power of ballast-lamp circuit of dimmable ballasts for tubular
fluorescent lamp at the dimming position corresponding to 25% of the Ilumen output of the oper-
ated lamp(See 5.2.3 and 5.3.2 of GB 17896一2012) ;

e) Added efficiency requirements of ballasts for high-pressure sodium lamps(CSee 4.1.5);

和 Deleted "Requirement on evaluating values of energy conservation”(See 5.4 of GB 17896一2012 .
4.3 of GB 19574一2004, 4.4 of GB 20053一2015,， 5.4 of GB 29143一2012)

g) Deleted requirement on standby power grades of ballasts for single-capped fluorescent induction

亚
